Name: Claude Usage
Author: Spero Autem LLC

Actions.Name: Claude Usage
Actions.Tooltip: Shows your Claude.ai session (5-hour) and weekly usage on a Stream Deck key.

Description: Free, unofficial plugin that shows your Claude.ai session (5-hour) and weekly usage on a Stream Deck key. Paste your session key once, then pick what to display per button: session, week, or both. Data is pulled from the same internal endpoint used by the official Claude.ai usage page.
